headline: Apollo Global Management (APO) Acquires Majority Stake in Noble Environmental
summary: Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE:APO) is one of the Best Value Stocks to Buy for Long Term Investment. On May 12, the company announced Apollo managed firm has acquired a majority stake in Noble Environmental, Inc. Noble Environment is a waste management company with operations spanning the Northeast, Mid-Atlantic, and Midwest United States. ​Management noted […]

headline: Is Apollo Global Management (APO) Pricing Reflect Its Recent Multi Year Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Apollo Global Management's current share price offers good value or not, it helps to start by lining up the recent returns against what the fundamentals might support. The stock recently closed at US$135.38, with returns of 3.8% over the past week and 8.6% over the past month, while year to date it is down 7.7% and over the last year it is down 4.0%. This is set against very large gains of 114.2% over three years and 159.7% over five years. Recent headlines...

headline: Standard Chartered taps investor relations head for CFO
summary: Costello will step in as group CFO for Standard Chartered as the bank moves forward with stablecoin expansion and preps for its upcoming investor day.

headline: Standard Chartered appoints new group CFO

headline: Private Credit Reckoning: KKR, BLK & Others Step In to Shore Up BDCs
summary: KKR & Co., BlackRock and Apollo are moving to stabilize pressured BDCs as falling asset values and troubled loans test private credit markets.

headline: Why a small UK lender has major U.S. credit firms on edge
summary: The continuing fallout from MFS' collapse has heightened fears that problems in complex credit markets pose a broader systemic risk.
